⚠Bug Report: Describe the issue you encountered while using the software

✔ To avoid invalid or redundant issues, please confirm before submitting
#Please fill in “x” inside the “[ ]” after confirmation

- [ ] 2. I have confirmed that existing issues cannot solve my problem
- [ ] 3. I have confirm that I will follow the template when filling out the issue.
- [ ] 4. I will describe the problem I encountered and explain it clearly and concisely
- [ ] 5. I have read the [ECHO Doc.](https://echonext.moe/zh/docs/) and still cannot resolve the issue
- [ ] 6. This is an open-source project. Developers and other users are not obligated to solve your problem, so please ask politely and patiently.
- [ ] 7. I confirm that I have read all the above.

⭕ Steps to Reproduce the Issue
#Replace the ** parts with the actual steps you took to reproduce the issue#:

Go to '...' (when I try to...)
Click on '...'
Scroll down to '...'
See error

Describe the expected behavior and briefly explain it.
Please attach logs (required for diagnosis)
(Optional) Screenshots if necessary
